creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
(In reply to Christian Weisgerber from comment #2)

Thanks for the info.

Warner (imp@) switched from the OpenBSD awk to the one-true-awk a while back:

https://git.freebsd.catflap.org/src/current/tree/contrib/one-true-awk

https://github.com/onetrueawk/awk

, but as you note, he didn't sync the manpage. Best liasing with him over this.

Cheers, Jamie
